channel.title: SpecLock Blog
channel.description: Articles on AI coding safety, CLAUDE.md enforcement, .cursorrules compliance, MCP constraint engines, and vibe coding guardrails. By the SpecLock team.

item.title: I Ran Claude Code on 50 Repos For a Month — Here's Every Time It Ignored CLAUDE.md
item.dc:creator: Sandeep Roy
item.description: Data from 50 real repositories: every time Claude Code, Cursor, and Copilot silently violated CLAUDE.md rules. The 7 drift patterns, real numbers, and a 30-second fix.

item.title: SpecLock: The MCP Constraint Engine for AI-Safe Development
item.dc:creator: Sandeep Roy
item.description: SpecLock is an MCP constraint engine with 51 tools for AI code safety. Technical deep-dive: semantic conflict detection, drift scoring, patch review, and compliance enforcement via MCP server.

item.title: Vibe Coding Is Great Until Your AI Deletes Your Database
item.dc:creator: Sandeep Roy
item.description: Vibe coding is fast and fun until your AI tool drops a table, rewrites your auth, or deletes your tests. Real examples of vibe coding disasters and how to add safety constraints with SpecLock.

item.title: How to Stop AI Coding Tools From Breaking Your Codebase
item.dc:creator: Sandeep Roy
item.description: AI coding tools are powerful but reckless. Learn how to prevent AI from breaking code with constraints, linting, and semantic enforcement. Compare manual review, linting, and SpecLock.

item.title: How to Actually Enforce .cursorrules in Cursor
item.dc:creator: Sandeep Roy
item.description: .cursorrules not working? Cursor ignores your rules because there's no enforcement layer. Learn how to enforce .cursorrules with SpecLock's semantic constraint engine.

item.title: Why CLAUDE.md Doesn't Work — How to Enforce CLAUDE.md Rules
item.dc:creator: Sandeep Roy
item.description: CLAUDE.md not working? Claude Code ignores your rules because CLAUDE.md is a suggestion, not a contract. Learn how to enforce CLAUDE.md with SpecLock's semantic constraint engine.
